```python
# Signed: Gemini + Gemini-2.5, 2025-02-15
# Format: MurphySig v0.3.3 (https://murphysig.dev/spec)
#
# Context: A Python utility function to convert a string into a URL-safe slug.
#
# Confidence: 1.0 - The regex-based slugification is standard and correct for basic ASCII inputs.
# Open: How to handle non-ASCII/Unicode characters (e.g., accents, Cyrillic, Hanzi) which are currently stripped out.

def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    """Convert a string to a URL-safe slug."""
    import re
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
    text = text.strip("-")
    return text
```
